content: To access paid services, please link a payment method. The person who adds it will automatically be assigned as the Payer for this account.

comment.text: Informational description text shown when no payment method is linked to the account, explaining the automatic assignment of a Payer.

usage.context:
<div>
 <Text fontSize="16px" fontWeight={700}>
 {t("NoPaymentMethod")}
 </Text>
 <Text className={styles.noPaymentDescription}>
 {t("NoPaymentMethodDesc")}
 </Text>
 <div className={styles.buttonWrapper}>
 <Button
 label={t("AddPaymentMethod")}
 size={ButtonSize.small}
